qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_cv as oi_cv, t0.c_cv as c_cv, t0.d_ape_y_nom as d_ape_y_nom, t0.c_nro_doc as c_nro_doc, t0.c_estado as c_estado, t0.c_sexo as c_sexo, t0.d_email as d_email, t0.c_viajar as c_viajar, t0.c_radicarse as c_radicarse, t0.c_lic_conduc as c_lic_conduc, t0.c_vehiculo as c_vehiculo, t0.d_ape_y_nom_fam1 as d_ape_y_nom_fam1, t0.te_nro_fam1 as te_nro_fam1, t0.d_email_fam1 as d_email_fam1, t0.d_ape_y_nom_fam2 as d_ape_y_nom_fam2, t0.te_nro_fam2 as te_nro_fam2, t0.d_email_fam2 as d_email_fam2, t0.d_ape_y_nom_ref1 as d_ape_y_nom_ref1, t0.te_nro_ref1 as te_nro_ref1, t0.d_email_ref1 as d_email_ref1, t0.d_ape_y_nom_ref2 as d_ape_y_nom_ref2, t0.te_nro_ref2 as te_nro_ref2, t0.d_email_ref2 as d_email_ref2, t0.c_tiene_pariente as c_tiene_pariente, SEC.policy, t0.c_cv as CODE, t0.d_ape_y_nom as TEXT, t0.oi_tipo_fam1 as oi_tipo_fam1, t0.oi_tipo_fam2 as oi_tipo_fam2, t0.oi_localidad as oi_localidad FROM SDP01_CV as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.CV\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_cv LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_cv asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_cv as oi_cv, SEC.policy FROM SDP01_CV as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.CV\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_cv LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_cv asc')/ROWS/ROW

attribute.description: Número de Teléfono Celular del Empleado.
attribute.label: Celular
attribute.name: te_celular

attribute.label: Dado de Alta desde la WEB?
attribute.name: l_alta_web

form-properties.label: Dado de Alta desde la WEB?

assosiation.description: Mantiene los conocimientos en informática del CV
assosiation.label: Conocimientos informáticos del CV
assosiation.name: INFORMATICA

assosiation.description: Registra los antecedentes laborales de los Empleados.
assosiation.label: Experiencia Laboral
assosiation.name: EXPERIENCIA

assosiation.description: Registra los Estudios que posee cada CV.
assosiation.label: Estudios CV
assosiation.name: ESTUDIOS_CV

key.msg: Ya existe un registro con el mismo Tipo y Número de Documento
key.name: AK_KEY_2_SDP01_CV

key.msg: Ya existe un registro con el mismo código de CV
key.name: AK_KEY_3_SDP01_CV

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.CV.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.CV.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP01_CV.oi_cv) as CNT from SDP01_CV Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP01_CV.oi_cv={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP01_CV.d_ape_y_nom,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP01_CV.c_cv,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
sqlMain
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT cv.oi_cv, cv.oi_tipo_documento, cv.oi_provincia, cv.oi_doc_digital, cv.oi_estado_civil, cv.oi_foto, cv.oi_pais, cv.c_cv, cv.d_apellido, cv.d_nombres, cv.d_ape_y_nom, cv.c_nro_doc, cv.c_estado, cv.c_sexo, cv.f_nacim, cv.c_nro_cuil, cv.d_localidad, cv.oi_localidad, cv.c_codigo_postal, cv.d_calle, cv.c_nro, cv.c_piso, cv.c_departamento, cv.d_email, cv.c_pais_cel, cv.c_area_cel, cv.te_celular, cv.c_pais, cv.c_area, cv.te_nro, cv.f_actualizacion, cv.c_seguridad, cv.c_lic_conduc, cv.c_vehiculo, cv.c_radicarse, cv.c_viajar, cv.oi_sit_laboral, cv.oi_tipo_jor_lab, cv.n_remuneracion, cv.l_maillist,
cv.d_ape_y_nom_fam1, cv.d_email_fam1, cv.te_nro_fam1, cv.oi_tipo_fam1, cv.d_ape_y_nom_fam2, cv.d_email_fam2, cv.te_nro_fam2, cv.oi_tipo_fam2, cv.d_ape_y_nom_ref1, cv.d_email_ref1, cv.te_nro_ref1, cv.d_ape_y_nom_ref2, cv.d_email_ref2, cv.te_nro_ref2,
cv.d_custom_1, cv.d_custom_2, cv.d_custom_3, cv.d_custom_4, cv.d_custom_5, cv.d_custom_6, cv.d_custom_7, cv.d_custom_8, cv.d_custom_9, cv.d_custom_10,
p.d_pais, sl.d_sit_laboral, tj.d_tipo_jor_lab, tf1.d_tipo_familiar as d_tipo_familiar1, tf2.d_tipo_familiar as d_tipo_familiar2
FROM SDP01_CV as cv, ORG35_PAISES as p, SDP17_SIT_LABORALES as sl, SDP16_TIPOS_JORNADA as tj, PER15_TIPOS_FAM as tf1, PER15_TIPOS_FAM as tf2
JOIN cv.oi_pais LEFT OUTER p.oi_pais, cv.oi_sit_laboral LEFT OUTER sl.oi_sit_laboral, cv.oi_tipo_jor_lab LEFT OUTER tj.oi_tipo_jor_lab, cv.oi_tipo_fam1 LEFT OUTER tf1.oi_tipo_familiar, cv.oi_tipo_fam2 LEFT OUTER tf2.oi_tipo_familiar
WHERE cv.oi_cv = {#SOURCE:@oi_cv} AND cv.c_seguridad = {#SOURCE:@c_seguridad}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlESTUDIOS_CV
sqlEXPERIENCIA
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT exp.oi_experiencia, exp.oi_puesto_exp, exp.d_empresa, exp.d_actividad, exp.o_contacto, exp.f_ingreso, exp.f_egreso, exp.o_tareas, exp.l_actual, exp.d_localidad, exp.oi_mod_contr, exp.oi_mot_egr, exp.oi_area_exp, exp.d_custom_1, exp.d_custom_2, exp.d_custom_3, exp.d_custom_4, exp.d_custom_5, exp.d_custom_6, exp.d_custom_7, exp.d_custom_8, exp.d_custom_9, exp.d_custom_10,
p.d_puesto_exp, mc.d_mod_contr, mep.d_mot_egr, ae.d_area_exp
FROM SDP01_EXPERIENCIA as exp, SDP09_PUESTO_EXP as p, PER35_MOD_CONTR as mc, SDP20_MOT_EGR as mep, SDP18_AREAS_EXP as ae
JOIN exp.oi_puesto_exp INNER p.oi_puesto_exp, exp.oi_mod_contr LEFT OUTER mc.oi_mod_contr, exp.oi_mot_egr LEFT OUTER mep.oi_mot_egr, exp.oi_area_exp LEFT OUTER ae.oi_area_exp
WHERE exp.oi_cv = {#SOURCE:@oi_cv}
ORDER BY f_ingreso DESC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlIDIOMAS_CV
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT i.oi_idioma_cv, i.oi_idioma, i.c_nivel_habla, i.c_nivel_lee, i.c_nivel_escribe, i.d_idioma,
oi.d_idioma as d_idioma_org
FROM SDP01_IDIOMAS_CV as i, ORG20_IDIOMAS as oi
JOIN i.oi_idioma INNER oi.oi_idioma
WHERE i.oi_cv = {#SOURCE:@oi_cv}
ORDER BY d_idioma ASC, d_idioma_org ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlINFORMATICA
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT i.oi_informatica_cv, i.oi_informatica, i.c_nivel, i.o_detalle,
si.d_informatica
FROM SDP01_INFORMATICA as i, SDP08_INFORMATICA as si
JOIN i.oi_informatica INNER si.oi_informatica
WHERE i.oi_cv = {#SOURCE:@oi_cv}
ORDER BY d_informatica ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlAREAS_CV
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT acv.oi_area_cv, acv.oi_area,
acv.e_custom_1, acv.e_custom_2, acv.e_custom_3, acv.e_custom_4, acv.e_custom_5, acv.d_custom_6, acv.d_custom_7, acv.d_custom_8, acv.d_custom_9, acv.d_custom_10,
a.d_area
FROM SDP01_AREAS_CV as acv, SDP09_AREAS as a
JOIN acv.oi_area INNER a.oi_area
WHERE acv.oi_cv = {#SOURCE:@oi_cv}
ORDER BY d_area ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT cv.oi_cv, cv.d_email, cv.c_password
FROM SDP01_CV as cv
WHERE cv.oi_tipo_documento = {#SOURCE:@oi_tipo_documento} AND cv.c_nro_doc = {#SOURCE:@c_nro_doc}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA.oi_nivel_idioma FROM ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA WHERE ORG24_NIV_IDIOMA.c_nivel_equiv = {#SOURCE:@c_nivel} ')/ROWS/ROW

method.description: Proceso que envia por Aviso la cantidad de postulaciones realizadas en un periodo de tiempo
method.name: AUTO_AlertaPostulaciones

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_valor FROM ORG26_PARAMETROS WHERE ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_modulo=\'SDP\' AND ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro=\'CantDiasPrevios\' ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT AVI.oi_aviso, AVI.d_mail, AVI.d_mail_alt_1, AVI.d_mail_alt_2, AVI.c_aviso, AVI.d_puesto, CV.d_ape_y_nom, CV.c_nro_doc, CV.d_email, CV.c_cv FROM SDP01_POSTU_CV as POSTU, SDP05_AVISOS as AVI, SDP01_CV as CV JOIN POSTU.oi_aviso INNER AVI.oi_aviso, POSTU.oi_cv INNER CV.oi_cv WHERE DATE2STRING(POSTU.f_postulacion) >= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_desde)} AND DATE2STRING(POSTU.f_postulacion) <= {Datetime(#SOURCE:@f_hasta)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

key.msg: El CV ya se encuentra Postulado a la Oferta Laboral.
key.name: AK_KEY_2_SDP01_PO

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.POSTULACIONES.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.POSTULACIONES.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_postulaciones) as CNT from SDP01_POSTU_CV, SDP05_AVISOS join SDP01_POSTU_CV.OI_AVISO inner SDP05_AVISOS.OI_AVISO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_postulaciones={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP05_AVISOS.d_puesto,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP01_POSTU_CV.f_postulacion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SDP01_POSTU_CV.oi_cv={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

key.msg: Ya se ha relacionado el Idioma seleccionado al CV

class.label: Informática CV

class.label: Experiencia Laboral CV
class.help: Registra los antecedentes laborales de los Empleados.
class.name: EXPERIENCIA

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

attribute.description: Nombre de la Empresa en que trabajó.
attribute.label: Empresa
attribute.name: d_empresa

attribute.description: Fecha en que ingresó al trabajo.
attribute.label: Fecha Ingreso
attribute.name: f_ingreso

attribute.description: Fecha en que egresó del trabajo.
attribute.label: Fecha Egreso
attribute.name: f_egreso

key.msg: Ya existe un registro para el Puesto y Fecha de Ingreso seleccionados.
key.name: AK_SDP01_EXPERIENCIA

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.EXPERIENCIA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.EXPERIENCIA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP01_EXPERIENCIA.oi_experiencia) as CNT from SDP01_EXPERIENCIA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP01_EXPERIENCIA.oi_experiencia={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP01_EXPERIENCIA.d_empresa,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP01_EXPERIENCIA.f_ingreso,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SDP01_EXPERIENCIA.oi_cv={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

class.help: Registra los Estudios que posee cada CV.
class.label: Estudio CV
class.name: ESTUDIO_CV

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

attribute.description: Indicar otro Estudio no disponible entre las opciones. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 100 caracteres.
attribute.label: Otro Estudio
attribute.name: d_otro_est_educ

attribute.description: Fecha de la última actualización de Estudios.
attribute.label: Fecha Actualización
attribute.name: f_actualiz

attribute.description: Observaciones de Estudio. Puede ser alfanumérico de hasta 1000 caracteres.
attribute.label: Observaciones
attribute.name: o_estudio

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.ESTUDIO_CV.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.SeleccionDePostulantes.CVs.ESTUDIO_CV.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SDP01_ESTUDIOS_CV.oi_estudio_cv) as CNT from SDP01_ESTUDIOS_CV Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SDP01_ESTUDIOS_CV.oi_estudio_cv={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SDP01_ESTUDIOS_CV.oi_estudio_cv,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SDP01_ESTUDIOS_CV.oi_estudio_cv,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SDP01_ESTUDIOS_CV.oi_cv={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:
